definition_of_done: Multiple companies, multiple users, role paths, tenant isolation, mail/onboarding, billing, and live Railway/Vercel proof must pass together.

gates.detail: Production accepted-only proof proof-mqurehfl created two companies, accepted both public invites, logged both admins in, created sales_agent, operations, and viewer users per company, and cleaned up synthetic data.

Resend accepted invite and forgot-password sends in proof-mqurehfl, and webhook tracking is deployed at /api/webhooks/resend. Strict delivery-event proof remains blocked because production RESEND_API_KEY is send-only and RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET is not configured.

NotificationBell and Copilot super-admin no-tenant regressions passed locally; production proof requires super_admin tenant routes to reject missing target_company_id and allow explicit target_company_id.
Tenant isolation matrix passed locally, and production proof-mqurehfl blocked cross-company user reads plus ignored non-super-admin target_company_id overrides.
Production proof proof-mqurehfl covered super_admin, company_admin, sales_agent, operations, and viewer creation/login/access checks.
SSO/MFA/SCIM status is not complete enough to call the platform enterprise-ready.

Railway deployment e1f1e7a7-3c76-46a5-883a-8851f54c1abe is live at commit 42a293b95; Vercel deployment dpl_7E2A2yU3jhTM7cahv6CtLaqoW4Yv is aliased to biginvesto.online; backend smoke passed. Strict email delivery-event proof remains blocked.

notes: This report intentionally supersedes the previous ready=true artifact.
Do not set ready=true from documentation alone; regenerate from live automated and production evidence.

To unblock strict mail proof, add RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET in Railway, register https://investo-backend-production.up.railway.app/api/webhooks/resend in Resend, or provide a read-capable RESEND_READ_API_KEY for the proof runner.
